This is a testharness.js-based test.
[FAIL] headingoffset property mutations update descendant headings
  Failed to execute 'matches' on 'Element': ':heading(1)' is not a valid selector.
[FAIL] nested headingoffset property mutations propagate to descendants
  Failed to execute 'matches' on 'Element': ':heading(1)' is not a valid selector.
[FAIL] headingoffset property mutations update all heading types
  Failed to execute 'matches' on 'Element': ':heading(1)' is not a valid selector.
[FAIL] headingoffset property mutations propagate to deeply nested desendants
  Failed to execute 'matches' on 'Element': ':heading(1)' is not a valid selector.
[FAIL] headingoffset property mutations on shadow host update shadow DOM headings
  Failed to execute 'matches' on 'Element': ':heading(1)' is not a valid selector.
[FAIL] headingoffset property mutations on ancestors of shadow host propagate to shadow DOM
  Failed to execute 'matches' on 'Element': ':heading(1)' is not a valid selector.
[FAIL] headingoffset property mutations inside shadow DOM update correctly
  Failed to execute 'matches' on 'Element': ':heading(1)' is not a valid selector.
[FAIL] headingoffset property mutations on slot element update slotted headings
  Failed to execute 'matches' on 'Element': ':heading(1)' is not a valid selector.
[FAIL] headingoffset property mutations on slot traverse into slotted element shadow roots
  Failed to execute 'matches' on 'Element': ':heading(1)' is not a valid selector.
[FAIL] headingoffset property mutations respect level clamping
  Failed to execute 'matches' on 'Element': ':heading(1)' is not a valid selector.
[FAIL] headingoffset property mutations propagate through two levels of shadow DOM with slotting
  Failed to execute 'matches' on 'Element': ':heading(1)' is not a valid selector.
[FAIL] headingoffset property mutations propagate through three levels of nested shadow DOM
  Failed to execute 'matches' on 'Element': ':heading(1)' is not a valid selector.
[FAIL] headingoffset property mutations update headings at multiple shadow DOM levels independently
  Failed to execute 'matches' on 'Element': ':heading(1)' is not a valid selector.

  Failed to execute 'matches' on 'Element': ':heading(1)' is not a valid selector.

  Failed to execute 'matches' on 'Element': ':heading(1)' is not a valid selector.

  Failed to execute 'matches' on 'Element': ':heading(1)' is not a valid selector.

  Failed to execute 'matches' on 'Element': ':heading(1)' is not a valid selector.

  Failed to execute 'matches' on 'Element': ':heading(1)' is not a valid selector.

  Failed to execute 'matches' on 'Element': ':heading(1)' is not a valid selector.

  Failed to execute 'matches' on 'Element': ':heading(1)' is not a valid selector.

  Failed to execute 'matches' on 'Element': ':heading(1)' is not a valid selector.

  Failed to execute 'matches' on 'Element': ':heading(1)' is not a valid selector.

  Failed to execute 'matches' on 'Element': ':heading(1)' is not a valid selector.

  Failed to execute 'matches' on 'Element': ':heading(1)' is not a valid selector.
[FAIL] headingoffset attribute mutations update headings at multiple shadow DOM levels independently
  Failed to execute 'matches' on 'Element': ':heading(1)' is not a valid selector.
[FAIL] headingreset mutations update descendant headings
  Failed to execute 'matches' on 'Element': ':heading(1)' is not a valid selector.
[FAIL] headingreset and headingoffset mutations interact correctly
  Failed to execute 'matches' on 'Element': ':heading(1)' is not a valid selector.
[FAIL] invalid headingoffset attribute values are handled correctly on mutation
  Failed to execute 'matches' on 'Element': ':heading(1)' is not a valid selector.
[FAIL] slot name attribute changes update slotted heading levels
  Failed to execute 'matches' on 'Element': ':heading(1)' is not a valid selector.
[FAIL] element slot attribute changes update heading levels
  Failed to execute 'matches' on 'Element': ':heading(1)' is not a valid selector.
[FAIL] slot element removal and addition updates slotted heading levels
  Failed to execute 'matches' on 'Element': ':heading(1)' is not a valid selector.
[FAIL] default slot to named slot transitions update heading levels
  Failed to execute 'matches' on 'Element': ':heading(1)' is not a valid selector.
[FAIL] swapping slot names updates multiple headings correctly
  Failed to execute 'matches' on 'Element': ':heading(1)' is not a valid selector.
[FAIL] manual slot assignment updates heading levels
  Failed to execute 'matches' on 'Element': ':heading(1)' is not a valid selector.
[FAIL] manual slot reassignment between slots updates heading levels
  Failed to execute 'matches' on 'Element': ':heading(1)' is not a valid selector.
[FAIL] non-HTML elements (SVG) slotted with heading descendants get updated
  Failed to execute 'matches' on 'Element': ':heading(1)' is not a valid selector.
[FAIL] non-HTML elements (MathML) slotted with heading descendants get updated
  Failed to execute 'matches' on 'Element': ':heading(1)' is not a valid selector.
[FAIL] manual slot assignment of non-HTML elements updates heading descendants
  Failed to execute 'matches' on 'Element': ':heading(1)' is not a valid selector.
Harness: the test ran to completion.
